tasks.title: Spec sync and boundary redline
tasks.goal: Update architecture specs so MCP owns facts and calculations while Mulan owns orchestration and presentation.
validation: Search specs for conflicting DCE primary-path claims
Search specs for renderer calculation claims
Review OpenSpec requirement
acceptance_criteria: Specs state MCP owns calculations
Specs state DCE is not primary path
Specs state Mulan wraps and explains MCP output

tasks.title: Disable DCE primary path
tasks.goal: Remove Dynamic Column Engine from successful answer data generation unless explicitly running shadow diagnostics.
implementation_scope: Disable DCE in primary response_data path
Preserve MCP returned fields and rows
Allow shadow output only in diagnostics
Expose no DCE values as authoritative
must_not: Compute business metrics in Python primary path
validation: DCE primary-path test shows MCP values unchanged
Shadow diagnostics absent by default
No renderer calculation is introduced
acceptance_criteria: Successful response_data contains MCP-authoritative values
DCE cannot change user-visible facts by default
No Python business formulas are required

tasks.title: MCP-first execution router
tasks.goal: Route MCP-answerable questions to Tableau MCP without requiring QuerySpec success first.
implementation_scope: Prefer MCP execution over QuerySpec blocker
must_not: Make uncontrolled proxy the permanent main path
Hardcode field or metric names in Python
validation: QuerySpec timeout does not block MCP-answerable query
Route trace records MCP-first decision
Non-query intents remain unaffected
acceptance_criteria: MCP-answerable questions reach guarded MCP execution
QuerySpec failure is diagnostic not terminal
Route is observable in trace

tasks.title: MCP args guardrail schema normalization
tasks.goal: Make the guardrail reject or normalize MCP args to the tool schema before every Tableau MCP execution.
implementation_scope: Emit pass, repair, or reject trace
must_not: Pass string field arrays to MCP
Guess aggregations from business terms in Python
validation: String field array is rejected or normalized before MCP
Valid object field array passes
All MCP execution paths emit guardrail trace
acceptance_criteria: Invalid MCP args do not reach Tableau MCP
Guardrail trace is present for direct and fallback paths
No schema invalid_union from field strings

tasks.title: QuerySpec demotion and fallback semantics
tasks.goal: Make QuerySpec useful for trace and planning hints without becoming the sole execution gate.
implementation_scope: Remove QuerySpec hard stop for MCP-answerable cases
validation: Provider timeout does not trigger QuerySpec repair
Model invalid is recorded with stable code
MCP execution can proceed when safe args exist
acceptance_criteria: QuerySpec failure does not reduce MCP baseline reachability
Fallback metrics remain reportable
No silent fallback

tasks.title: Thin response contract and renderer boundary
tasks.goal: Wrap MCP output into stable response_data and restrict renderer to explanation and formatting.
implementation_scope: Use MCP rows as source of truth
Fallback renderer to deterministic table only
must_not: Emit success without table data for table-capable query
validation: table_data equals done.response_data table
Renderer unavailable does not trigger MCP fallback
Renderer output references only MCP data
acceptance_criteria: MCP facts are preserved
Frontend can render without inference
Renderer is not a calculation path

tasks.title: Context resolver without calculation
tasks.goal: Resolve multi-turn references for MCP args without computing facts or metrics inside Mulan.
validation: Follow-up can reach guarded MCP
Unresolved reference returns controlled error
Context trace is present
acceptance_criteria: Multi-turn references improve routing
No calculation occurs in context resolver
Stale context is observable

tasks.title: Live baseline gate and commit decision
tasks.goal: Validate contracted Mulan behavior against direct MCP baseline before any commit.
implementation_scope: Compare direct MCP and Mulan response_data
must_not: Treat renderer prose as baseline data
validation: Quality gate status is pass
QuerySpec success threshold is met or no longer primary gate
MCP guardrail trace exists for all MCP executions
acceptance_criteria: Mulan is not worse than direct MCP on Batch 2
No guardrail bypass remains
Commit is allowed only after pass
